channel.title: Philosophy on Notes from the digital underground by Lngnmn
channel.description: Recent content in Philosophy on Notes from the digital underground by Lngnmn

item.title: The Philosophy Of What Is
item.description:
Sometimes I feel that everything can be collapsed back to What Is, discarding all the socially constructed abstract bullshit, and a less wrong, less distorted observation can be made for a few seconds – a glimpse of a the Truth.

The task is quite simple – just to reconcile logic, math, programming and the Eastern philosophy of the mind, keeping the properly generalized patterns and tossing away abstract bullshit. Once you have done this a couple times…
